shipping_clearance.description: We offer integrated shipping solutions (Air, Sea, Land) with customs clearance management and shipment tracking until destination.

sourcing.title: Product & Supplier Sourcing
sourcing.description: We help you find the right products and verified suppliers while checking records, reputation, and compliance.

step1.title: Initial Consultation
step1.description: We discuss your specific needs and budget to create a tailored sourcing strategy.

step2.title: Supplier Identification
step2.description: Our team selects and audits potential suppliers based on your quality standards.

step3.title: Sampling & Negotiation
step3.description: We obtain samples for your approval and negotiate the best possible terms and prices.

step4.title: Ordering & Inspection
step4.description: Once ordered, we monitor production and conduct rigorous quality inspections.

step5.title: Logistics & Delivery
step5.description: We manage the entire shipping and customs clearance process until goods reach your door.

hero.label: Founded to be the Best
hero.description: Rabzan combines traditional wisdom with logistics innovation to offer you trade solutions that know no impossible.

story.label: Our Inspiring Story
story.legacy_text: Started from ports to conquer markets with engineering precision.
story.p1: We realized from the start that trade is not just numbers and contracts, but a pulse of life and continuous movement requiring extreme precision and deep understanding of cultures and markets.
story.p2: Since our inception, our goal has been to remove obstacles for ambitious companies by providing flexible, secure, and carefully studied supply chains, allowing our partners to focus on their growth while we ensure the quality and speed of their product arrival.

values_section.label: Our Vision & Values
values_section.title: The Foundations We Build Your Success On

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: Empowering global trade through innovative sourcing solutions and ethical logistics that put the client first.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: To be the most trusted link in international trade, setting new standards for logistics excellence.

values.title: Our Values
values.text: Integrity, absolute transparency, and commitment to building sustainable partnerships beyond just business transactions.

10.name: Disposable Meat Slicer (Model: RBZ-DR350)
10.description: Industrial meat dicing / slicing machine in full 304 stainless steel, 500–600 kg/h.
10.long_description: Heavy-duty disposable meat slicer (meat dicing machine) built from full 304 stainless steel. High throughput with German reducer, dual 1.5 kW motors for oil pump and reducer, and 380V three-phase power for stable commercial operation.
features: Full 304 stainless steel construction for hygiene and durability
500–600 kg/h production capacity with 5 / 10 mm cutting size options
German reducer with 1.5 kW oil pump and 1.5 kW reducer motors

11.name: Hair Stick Peeling Machine (Model: RBZ-MG1800)
11.description: High-capacity peeling line with 8 rollers, 2000–3000 kg/h, 304 stainless steel.
11.long_description: Industrial hair stick peeling machine with eight 1800 mm rollers for continuous washing and peeling. Full 304 stainless steel body, mobile frame with casters, ideal for large-scale fruit and vegetable processing.
features: 8 peeling rollers, 1800 mm length, 140 mm diameter
Production capacity 2000–3000 kg/h
Full 304 stainless steel, 380V three-phase, 2.2 kW power

12.name: Meat Pie Machine (Model: RBZ-MB100)
12.description: Automatic meat pie / patty former with 30L hopper, conveyor output, 35 pcs/min.
12.long_description: Compact meat pie forming machine in full 304 stainless steel. 30L material hopper, mesh conveyor for discharge, adjustable product diameter 30–130 mm, suitable for patties and similar formed products.
features: 35 pieces per minute, 30L hopper capacity
130 mm conveyor width, 500 mm conveyor length
Full 304 stainless steel, 0.55 kW, 380V three-phase

13.name: Bubble Ozone Cleaning Machine (Model: RBZ-QX2200)
13.description: Bubble ozone wash line for fruit and vegetables, 500–1000 kg/h, 304 stainless steel.
13.long_description: Industrial bubble ozone cleaning machine with spray bars, perforated tank, and inclined discharge conveyor. Full 304 stainless steel construction for sanitary washing and sanitizing of bulk produce.
features: Bubble ozone washing with overhead spray system
500–1000 kg/h capacity, compact 2200 mm length footprint
380V three-phase, 1.7 kW, easy to move on heavy-duty casters

14.name: Frozen Meat Cutting Machine (Model: RBZ-SR120S)
14.description: Stainless steel frozen meat cutter with adjustable slice thickness 1–32 mm and 120 mm belt.
14.long_description: Heavy-duty frozen meat cutting machine in full 304 stainless steel. Adjustable cutting thickness from 1 to 32 mm, 120 mm wide feed belt, and 380V three-phase drive for reliable continuous operation in cold chains.
features: Full 304 stainless steel construction
Cutting thickness 1–32 mm adjustable; 120 mm belt width
380V / 60Hz / 3-phase, 0.77 kW — mobile frame with casters

15.name: Cold Laminator (Model: RBZ 1700-B5)
15.description: Wide-format cold laminator up to 1630 mm width, 28 mm thickness, 6 m/min.
15.long_description: Industrial cold laminator for wide graphics and signage. Pneumatic roller control, digital panel, and heavy-duty frame on casters for workshop mobility.
features: Max width 1630 mm, max material thickness 28 mm
Speed up to 6 m/min, low power 120 W
Professional cold lamination for boards and flexible media

16.name: Eco Solvent Printer (Model: RBZ-1800)
16.description: 1.8 m eco-solvent printer with four I3200-E1 heads and Maintop RIP software.
16.long_description: Large-format eco solvent printer with 1800 mm print width, four Epson I3200-E1 print heads, and Maintop software for stable production of banners, decals, and outdoor graphics.
features: Print width 1800 mm, four I3200-E1 heads
Maintop RIP included for production workflows
Industrial chassis with cooling and mobile stand

17.name: Roll Laminator (1.7 m) – Model: RBZ-1700S
17.description: Hot roll laminator 1.7 m, up to 1730 mm width, 50 mm thickness, 125°C, 58 m/min.
17.long_description: Industrial hot roll laminator for wide-format graphics. High-speed operation up to 58 m/min, temperature up to 125°C, and heavy-duty construction. Available without cutter or with cutter — see pricing options.
features: Max laminating width 1730 mm, thickness up to 50 mm
Hot laminator up to 125°C, speed up to 58 m/min
Heavy package ~1000 kg — confirm logistics with our team

18.name: Cutting Plotter (1.6 m) – Model: RBZ-GH1660
18.description: 1.66 m vinyl cutting plotter, 1540 mm cut width, SignMaster software.
18.long_description: Large-format vinyl cutting plotter for signage and vehicle graphics. Wide material path, precise cutting width, and SignMaster software for production workflows.

SignMaster software
Compact shipping: 1950 × 350 × 430 mm (0.3 CBM), 42 kg

hero.label: Our Services
hero.description: We offer a comprehensive range of services designed to streamline your import journey, from source to warehouse.

hero.label: Smart Workflow Methodology
hero.title: We Work With
hero.description: Our systematic approach is divided into clear stages ensuring transparency and full control over every part of the supply journey.

faq.title: Have Questions? We Have Answers.
faq.description: We have compiled the most common inquiries to clearer clarity on our vision.

items.q: How long does the executive process usually take?
items.a: Timelines vary based on product type and geography, but most projects are completed within 4 to 8 weeks from initial consultation to final delivery.

items.q: What order sizes can you handle?
items.a: We specialize in medium to large volume shipments, Full Container Loads (FCL), and have the capacity to scale for major factory needs.

items.q: How do you ensure product quality in remote factories?
items.a: Our field inspection team conducts rigorous checks in three stages: Pre-production, During Production, and Pre-shipment to ensure specification compliance.

items.q: Do you provide periodic follow-up reports?
items.a: Yes, we provide full transparency via detailed weekly reports including photos and live data on manufacturing and logistics status.
